UPDATE dynamischeKorrekturFaktorenOption SET subtypeTxtOptNameDKff = 'test 4', subtypeTxtoptzBezugDkff = '2008', subtypeTxtoptzTempDkff = '', subtypeTxtoptzFaktoreDkff = '7', formatDynamicType = 'year', bezugStartTxt = '', bezugEndTxt = '', tempStartTxt = '', tempEndTxt = '' WHERE dKffOption_id = 28
